name: T&T - Trinkets and Trackers
description:
Trinkets and Trackers is a Roll20 Mod script for managing character inventories, coins, item use, item catalogs, and shops from chat cards and token actions.

Important setup: set the Roll20 API Sandbox Version to Experimental before using this script. The script also expects three handouts named T&T Items Catalog, T&T Items Template, and T&T Shop Catalog.

Main commands: !tnt, !tntHelp, !tntToken init, !tntInventory, !tntCurrency give, !tntCurrency take, !tntItem search, !tntItem details, !tntShop list, !tntShop get, !tntShop buy, and !tntShop menu.

GM tools include token setup, item catalog management, shop creation, shop stock, shop prices, shop import, shop export, and direct character attribute inspection.
